videos.title: Why the tech workforce is quietly splitting in two | Annual AI sentiment survey (Noam Segal)
videos.description: Noam Segal is a longtime research leader across Airbnb, Meta, Twitter, Zapier, Intercom, and Figma, a certified coach, AI builder, and my community research lead. Together, we run the annual Tech Worker Sentiment Survey, now in its second year and one of the largest of its kind: a quantitative study

videos.title: The shape of product teams in 2026
The rise of taste, human authenticity and judgment in an AI world | Adam Mosseri (Head of IG)
videos.description: Adam Mosseri is the Head of Instagram, where he oversees an app used by over 3 billion people. He also leads the team building Threads.
